ops.title: daemonkit decision: SMAppService is the greenfield launchd default
ops.body:
**Decision (hardening pass, 2026-07-18):** SMAppService (embedded agent-plist registration via Swift `LoginItem.reconcile`) is the default launchd mode for every greenfield shipped agent/daemon and GUI helper. Web evidence: no battle-tested `open -g -W` adopter exists outside this fleet; SMAppService is Apple's supported path with BTM visibility.

`service.AppKeepAlive` (`open -g -W` waiter) survives ONLY on the already-deployed fusekit-holder path through Track F — its reattach semantics are load-bearing for drain (the waiter rides the old instance and adopts the running successor on exit). Never change AppKeepAlive's Program shape while it lives. After Track F's live upgrade/uninstall proof, a go/no-go on converging fusekit-holder to SMAppService is recorded.

`LoginItem.reconcile` is NOT a one-shot flag: `.enabled` returns; `.requiresApproval` opens System Settings and reports pending; `.notFound`/`.notRegistered`/other attempt `register()` (`.notFound` before first registration would make a one-shot scheme silently fail forever). BTM self-heal: verify actual process/readiness; on `status == .enabled` with no readiness, bounded unregister/register recovery, verified via `sfltool dumpbtm`.
